text: If you have a question regarding this Privacy Notice or the topic of data protection at Zalando in general, you can contact our Privacy Team by sending an email to datenschutz@zalando.de .

section: 1. Which data does Zalando process?
text: If particular information is required in connection with a service (mandatory information), we will inform you by marking it accordingly.

section: 1. Which data does Zalando process?
text: Your first and last names - Your contact details Mandatory information is usually your name, your email address and a password you choose yourself.

section: 1. Which data does Zalando process?
text: When using online and mobile services, it is inevitable that technical data will be generated and processed in order to provide the features and content offered and to display them on your device.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: Zalando processes your data in accordance with all applicable data protection laws.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: Of course, we observe the principles of data protection law for the processing of personal data.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: Depending on the legal basis for our processing of your data, you may have additional data protection rights alongside your permanent rights such as the right to information.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: For example, in individual cases you have the right to object to the processing of your data.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: Which data protection rights do I have? 2.1 Provision of online services.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: We process your data in the necessary scope to fulfil contracts and to provide and execute further services requested by you, as described in this Privacy Notice.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: The purposes of the necessary data processing therefore depend on the purpose of the contract agreed with you (including our General Terms and Conditions and any service-specific terms and conditions or terms of use) or services requested by you.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: Legal Basis: Insofar as the purpose relates to the execution of a contract agreed with you or the provision of a service requested by you, the legal basis is Article 6 (1) b GDPR.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: Otherwise, the legal basis is Article 6 (1) f GDPR, whereby we may use your personal data for the above purposes if we deem it necessary to do so for our legitimate interests. 2.2 Fraud prevention.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: Legal basis: If your data is processed to prevent fraud at your expense, the legal basis is Article 6 (1) b GDPR.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: This processing of your data otherwise occurs on the basis of Article 6 (1) f GDPR, based on our legitimate interest and that of other users in the identification and prevention of fraud and clarification of criminal offences.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: We transmit and process your data where necessary for administrative and logistical processes and to optimise business processes within Zalando Group in order to design these in a more efficient and legally secure way and to fulfil our contractual and legal obligations (e.g. retention obligations under commercial and tax law).

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: - The prevention and clarification of criminal offences.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: Legal basis: The legal basis for the processing of your data for business management and optimisation is Article 6 (1) f GDPR, whereby our legitimate interests are in the above purposes.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: Where we process your data on the basis of legal specifications, e.g. retention obligations and money laundering tests under tax law, the legal basis is Article 6 (1) c GDPR.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: If you have given us your consent for the processing of personal data, your consent is the primary basis of our data processing.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: - The recording of telephone conversations which you have e.g. with our hotline. -

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: If data protection law allows it, we can use your data for new purposes such as carrying out data analyses and developing our services and content without your consent.

section: 3. Info on websites
text: Facebook Social Links We use social links by the social network facebook.com, operated by Facebook Ireland Limited, 4 Grand Canal Square, Dublin 2, Ireland (“Facebook”), on several websites.

section: 3. Info on websites
text: YouTube social links We use social links by YouTube by Google Ireland Limited, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland (“YouTube”).

section: 3. Info on websites
text: Legal basis: The legal basis for the processing of your data is Article 6 (1) f GDPR, to enable comfortable and personalized use of our website.

section: 3. Info on websites
text: In certain cases, these tools may also be required for the fulfilment of a contract or for the execution of pre-contractual measures, in which case processing is carried out in accordance with Art.

text: 6 (1) a GDPR.

section: 3. Info on websites
text: In the event that personal data is transferred to the USA or other third countries, your consent expressly extends to the data transfer (Art. 49 (1) a GDPR).

section: 3. Info on websites
text: If personal data is transferred to these third countries, there is a risk that personal data may be collected and analysed by authorities and that data subjects' rights guaranteed under EU law may not be enforced.

section: 3. Info on websites
text: If you consent to the use of cookies, your consent also extends to these data transfers to third countries and the processing there.

section: 6. Who is my data forwarded to?
text: Who is my data forwarded to? Zalando only forwards your data if this is allowed by German or European law.

section: 6. Who is my data forwarded to?
text: Therefore, companies within the Zalando Group which require access to your data to fulfil our contractual and legal obligations, or to fulfil their respective functions within the Zalando Group, receive this access.

section: 6. Who is my data forwarded to?
text: If we are obliged by an official or court decision or it is for prosecution purposes, we will if necessary forward your data to prosecution authorities or other third parties.

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: You have the following legal data protection rights under the relevant legal conditions: Right to information (Article 15 GDPR), right to deletion (Article 17 GDPR), right to correction (Article 16 GDPR), right to restriction of processing (Article 18 GDPR), right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (Article 77 GDPR), right to withdraw consent (Article 7 (3) GDPR) as well as the right to object to particular data processing measures (Article 21 GDPR).

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: If you want to exercise your data protection rights you must submit a written request by registered post to our Data Protection Officer.

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: The responsibilities of the data protection authorities depend on the seat of the competent authorities.

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: - You may not object to the processing of your data for advertising purposes, including direct marketing (including in the form of data analysis).

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: In the event of a justified objection, we will check the state of affairs and either stop or adjust the processing, or inform you of the urgent reasons worthy of protection why we are entitled to continue the processing.

section: 8. When will my data be deleted?
text: When will my data be deleted? We will store your account data as long as is necessary for the purposes named in this Privacy Notice, especially for the fulfilment of our contractual and legal obligations.

section: 8. When will my data be deleted?
text: We may also store your personal data for other purposes if or as long as the law allows us to store it for particular purposes, including for defence against legal claims.

section: 8. When will my data be deleted?
text: If it is not possible or necessary to completely delete your data for legal reasons, the relevant data will be blocked for further processing.

section: 8. When will my data be deleted?
text: Deletion may be waived in the cases allowed by law if the data is anonymous or pseudonymous and deletion would rule out or seriously hinder processing for scientific research or statistical purposes.

section: 10. Changes to this Privacy Notice and points of contact
text: You can reach out to our customer service department for general questions on privacy and in order to exercise your data protection rights by sending an email to datenschutz@zalando.de .
